trial_details.trajectory:
The pod is in an ErrImageNeverPull status, which indicates that the Docker image specified in the pod definition cannot be pulled.The describe output shows that the issue is with the image name "misspeling-app:latset". The image is not available, causing the ErrImageNeverPull error.The fix is to update the image name in the deployment spec from "misspeling-app:latset" to "misspelling-app:latest".

FIX COMPLETE

## COMMANDS EXECUTED:

   Output: Name:             misspelling-deployment-6579ff5454-5bwlt
Namespace:        case6-test
Priority:         0
Service Account:  default
Node:             minikube/192.168.49.2
Start Time:       Wed, 03 D...
3. $ kubectl patch deployment misspelling-deployment -n case6-test --type=json -p='[{"op": "replace", "path": "/spec/template/spec/containers/0/image", "value": "misspelling-app:latest"}]'
   Output: deployment.apps/misspelling-deployment patched...
